description: H Rally in Large Masses to the 14 th Anniversary Celebration WORKERS OF THE WORLD UNITE VOL VIII No 268 U S TRIES TO PROVOKE WAR CALLS FOR CREDIT BOYCOTT ON THE SOVIET UNION AS WORKERS HAIL 14th ANNIVERSARY CELEBRATE 14th YEAR OF WORKERS RULE IN SOVIET UNION DEMONSTRATE AGAINST IMPERIALIST WAR ON WORKERS FATHERLAND ALL OUT TO BRONX COLISEUM TONIGHT Thousands of workers will be turned away tonight from the huge Bronx Coliseum at 177th Street where the New York District of the Communist Party has arranged the celebration of the 14th anniversary of the Bolshevik revolution The great triumphs of socialist construc tion in the Sviet Union which is the only country in the world that has abolished unemployment and where the wages living standards of the masses has risen tremendously as a result of the successful building of socialism surrounded by a world of decaying capitalism mass hunger insanity suicides deaths fascist and police terror against strik ers and militant unemployed and imperialist war constitutes the only solution of the ever worsening crisis will be outlined by the speakers The New York workers will give their answer tonisrht at the Coli seum to the feverish plans of
